body:
## Updates:
- [GP#1465](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1465): Updated local Minecraft version list (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1466](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1466): Include API Key when downloading files from CurseForge source (by @MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1443](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1443): Version configuration enum serialization broken due to obfuscation (by @MovTery)
- [Main#1679297](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/1679297): Use launcher UA directly when downloading (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1467](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1467): Clipboard content read in-game may be null (by @MovTery)
- [Main#132b8d1](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/132b8d1): Fixed JVM argument parsing causing incorrect argument concatenation (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1479](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1479): Roll back the Material3 library to version 1.5.0-alpha20 (by @MovTery)
